objects.name: Password Guessing
objects.description: Adversaries may use password guessing to brute force authentication services.

objects.name: PowerShell
objects.description: Adversaries may abuse PowerShell for execution and discovery.

objects.name: Abuse Elevation Control Mechanism
objects.description: Adversaries may elevate privileges through sudo or other control mechanisms.

objects.name: SMB/Windows Admin Shares
objects.description: Adversaries may move laterally through SMB and admin shares.

objects.name: Network Service Discovery
objects.description: Adversaries may scan networks to identify reachable services.

objects.name: Exfiltration Over Unencrypted Non-C2 Protocol
objects.description: Adversaries may exfiltrate data over a protocol not otherwise used for command and control.

objects.name: Brute Force
objects.description: Adversaries may attempt many passwords or keys to gain account access.

objects.name: Active Scanning
objects.description: Adversaries may actively probe victim-controlled systems prior to intrusion.

objects.name: Valid Accounts
objects.description: Adversaries may use stolen or default accounts to gain persistence or evade defenses.
